name: Granadan Baked Bananas
recipeIngredient: 4 Ripe bananas, peeled and sliced lengthwise
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees (F). Grease well a 9 inch ovenproof pan. Put the brown sugar in a heavy saucepan. Heat carefully until it liquifies. Add the orange juice, rum, cinnamon, nutmeg, and vanilla. Stir until combined. Pour over the bananas. Place in the oven and bake for about 30 minutes.
